alignment.description:
Align trimmed reads to a reference genome. Method neutrality: the concrete
aligner (STAR / HISAT2 / BWA-MEM2 / minimap2 / Bowtie2 / Salmon-alevin)
is selected at runtime by the agent. EDAM operation:3198 (Read mapping)
is the more-specific child of operation:0292 (Sequence alignment).

data_acquisition.description:
Acquire raw experimental data from public repositories (SRA, GEO, ArrayExpress,
ENA, PRIDE, ClinVar, gnomAD, GTEx) or SME-supplied paths. Emits a cohort manifest,
per-accession provenance summary, and an index pointing at the materialized
artifacts. Downstream atoms consume the manifest, not the raw bytes directly.

differential_expression.description:
Test for differentially expressed genes between conditions / cell types.
DESeq2 / edgeR / limma-voom / MAST / Wilcoxon selected at runtime based on
modality (bulk vs single-cell) and design.

discover_alignment.description: Discover method for alignment (options: star, hisat2, bwa_mem2, bwa_mem, minimap2, bowtie2). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_differential_expression.description: Discover method for differential_expression (options: deseq2, edger, limma_voom, mast, wilcoxon). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_normalisation.description: Discover method for normalisation (options: deseq2_vst, edger_tmm, scran, seurat_lognormalize, sctransform). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_pathway_enrichment.description: Discover method for pathway_enrichment (options: fgsea, clusterprofiler, gsea, enrichr). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_quantification.description: Discover method for quantification (options: salmon, kallisto, featurecounts, htseq, rsem). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_sequence_trimming.description: Discover method for sequence_trimming (options: trimmomatic, cutadapt, fastp, trim_galore). Surface set_intake_method.

final_reporting.description:
Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

normalisation.description:
Standardise expression values to remove library-size and composition biases.
Method neutrality: DESeq2 VST / edgeR TMM / scran pooling / Seurat
LogNormalize / scnorm / sctransform are selected at runtime.

pathway_enrichment.description:
Test pre-defined gene sets (KEGG / Reactome / GO / MSigDB hallmark) against
ranked DE results. fgsea / clusterProfiler / GSEA / enrichr selected at runtime.

qc_preprocessing.description:
Apply count-matrix-level QC: cell or sample filtering by total counts, gene
detection, mitochondrial fraction, and doublet score. Distinct from `raw_qc`
(which operates on raw reads). swfc:scrnaseq_cell_qc per the EDAM audit —
EDAM operation:3218 conflates raw-read QC with count-matrix QC.

quantification.description:
Quantify gene- or transcript-level expression from aligned reads. Method
neutrality: featureCounts / HTSeq / Salmon / kallisto / RSEM are selected
at runtime. Emits a count matrix consumed by downstream normalisation.

raw_qc.description:
Run sequencing QC (FastQC, MultiQC) on raw FASTQ inputs. Emits a per-sample metric
table and aggregated report; downstream `sequence_trimming` reads the trim-needed
flag.

reporting.description:
Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

sequence_trimming.description:
Trim adapters and low-quality bases from raw reads. Conditional in legacy
taxonomies on `raw_qc.result.needs_trimming`; the atom always runs and emits
trimmed FASTQ regardless of whether it altered the inputs (idempotent on
already-clean data).
